title: Podman build gives "ERRO[0378] error unmounting /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/..."
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
When tried to build an image using podman getting below error repeatedly :

ERRO[0378] error unmounting /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/4722e4f1d0cfe2e9d4ff26241a74eb0750c7d6bb187bbf7c6692bda3a875f849/merged: invalid argument
Error: error mounting new container: error mounting build container "01bdc8df7dc81adc19602239c90c843d39d58458b2cdf2f11eefd53948c73ebc": error creating overlay mount to /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/4722e4f1d0cfe2e9d4ff26241a74eb0750c7d6bb187bbf7c6692bda3a875f849/merged, mount_data="nodev,metacopy=on,lowerdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/ZMEF63F2NGZJFXNRVVPKZMZ4KM:/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/D3CM2BWNOXVMJ6MOUE45YZR6RF:/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/HCZY24MVA5RGOLL7IZ6FB26XWI:/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/YCEJDLXNLVRNMVU4MVFEK7MKQO:/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/M3VFAUBQG4JUYC5B7NEGKAEIC2:/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/2TANN3TA3HIJVDI43BDCFD6LH4:/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/PWVMYKSSVYCKCMGTIXS7FRINXW:/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/RPUNR63P4VS5IX77ZVZYNHNYBW:/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/OGNU3BTVIH6GYKJRBI2WZOVMGR,upperdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/4722e4f1d0cfe2e9d4ff26241a74eb0750c7d6bb187bbf7c6692bda3a875f849/diff,workdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/4722e4f1d0cfe2e9d4ff26241a74eb0750c7d6bb187bbf7c6692bda3a875f849/work": invalid argument
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Create a dockefile with following contents : 
FROM python:3.8
RUN apt-get update && apt-get -y upgrade
RUN pip install --upgrade pip
WORKDIR /app .
EXPOSE 8000
RUN chmod 777 -R /app
CMD [ "python", "./server.py" ]
(server.py contains simple print of a list)

2. Execute sudo podman build -t aakash .

3. Receiving below error : 
ERRO[0378] error unmounting /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/4722e4f1d0cfe2e9d4ff26241a74eb0750c7d6bb187bbf7c6692bda3a875f849/merged: invalid argument
Error: error mounting new container: error mounting build container "01bdc8df7dc81adc19602239c90c843d39d58458b2cdf2f11eefd53948c73ebc": error creating overlay mount to /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/4722e4f1d0cfe2e9d4ff26241a74eb0750c7d6bb187bbf7c6692bda3a875f849/merged, mount_data="nodev,metacopy=on,lowerdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/ZMEF63F2NGZJFXNRVVPKZMZ4KM:/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/l/D3CM2BWNOXVMJ6MOUE45YZR6RF:/v......."


**Describe the results you received:**

Error

**Describe the results you expected:**
 Image should be created successfully

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**
podman version 3.4.2
```
(paste your output here)
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**


**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```

```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes/No

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body:
Is this error consistent if you perform multiple builds? Do other Dockerfiles build successfully?

@nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL
The docker would run fine , but the podman gives error for simplest of docker files.

Hi @aakash086 Could you please paste the full error, you have pasted incomplete error so its hard to tell what's failing. But it seems something is going wrong while using `overlay` on your system, full error message would help us debug this better.

Also try using latest `podman` since `3.4.2` looks old and lot of changes went after that. https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v3.4.4

Hi @flouthoc  : I have uninstalled everything and going to install Podman from scratch today, allow me 1 day of time and if I get the same error , I am going to put it here. Thanks for acknowledging though.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Since we got no more feedback, I am assuming the error went away,  Reopen if I am mistaken.
